MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, Hearing on order to Show Cause re: Contempt, is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Plaintiff'S Ex Parte Application For Writ Of Possession And/Or Temporary Restraining Orderas To Defendant: Frits Jacobowitz

MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Lisa C. Mccurdy, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Marcie M. Matthew

After hearing, plaintiff's ex parte application for writ of possession - granted; temporary restraining order - granted. Orders signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
